mobilyze.settings.title_enabled: Force full-screen mobile layout and auto-hiding top bar
mobilyze.settings.title_wrap: Allow message text to flow under avatars
mobilyze.settings.title_jumppill: Floating up/down buttons on the side of the chat that let you step through messages one at a time
mobilyze.settings.title_tall_autohide: Apply the auto-hiding menu bar behavior even on tall (desktop-sized) screens
mobilyze.settings.reveal_required_hint: At least one reveal method is required
mobilyze.settings.title_scroll_reveal: Scroll up in chat to show the menu bar
mobilyze.settings.title_edge_swipe: Swipe down from the top edge of the screen to show the menu bar (touch only)
mobilyze.settings.title_pull_tab: Show a drag handle at the top of the screen when the menu bar is hidden
mobilyze.settings.label_hide_on_load: Hide navigation controls on load screen
mobilyze.settings.title_hide_on_load: Hide the jump buttons and swipe controls when no character is loaded
mobilyze.settings.title_debug: Enable verbose logging in the browser console
mobilyze.settings.footer_hint: Drag the handle at the top of the screen, or scroll up in chat, to show the menu bar.
